ILLUSIONIST_RELIC_HALLUCINATORY_LAMP.des: At the start of each combat, [gold]Copy[/gold] 1.
ILLUSIONIST_RELIC_HALLUCINATORY_LAMP.fla: Rub it, and a second you steps out of the smoke.
ILLUSIONIST_RELIC_PRISM_SHARD.title: Prism Shard
ILLUSIONIST_RELIC_PRISM_SHARD.descriptio: Whenever you create a [gold]mirror image[/gold], gain 1 [gold]Block[/gold].
ILLUSIONIST_RELIC_PRISM_SHARD.flavor: Every facet remembers a different light.
ILLUSIONIST_RELIC_HEAD_START.title: Swift Boots
ILLUSIONIST_RELIC_HEAD_START.description: The first card you play each turn costs 1 less.
ILLUSIONIST_RELIC_HEAD_START.flavor: The race is won before the first step.
ILLUSIONIST_RELIC_UNBREAKABLE_MIRROR.des: The first time you would take unblocked damage each combat, your [gold]mirror images[/gold] are not destroyed.
ILLUSIONIST_RELIC_UNBREAKABLE_MIRROR.fla: Crack it all you like — the reflection will not break.
ILLUSIONIST_RELIC_PRISTINE_MIRROR.title: Pristine Mirror
ILLUSIONIST_RELIC_PRISTINE_MIRROR.descri: At the end of your turn, if you took no unblocked damage that turn, [gold]Copy[/gold] 1.
ILLUSIONIST_RELIC_PRISTINE_MIRROR.flavor: Not a single smudge. Not a single scar.
ILLUSIONIST_RELIC_ANCIENT_LAMP.title: Lamp Unbound
ILLUSIONIST_RELIC_ANCIENT_LAMP.descripti: At the start of each combat, [gold]Copy[/gold] 3. At the start of your turn, if you have no [gold]mirror images[/gold], [gold]Copy[/gold] 1.
ILLUSIONIST_RELIC_ANCIENT_LAMP.flavor: Its first owner wished for company. He was never alone again.
